description: backend: cargo build --release + GitHub Release workflow
context: Create .github/workflows/release.yml: triggered on tag push v*.*.*. Jobs: build-linux (cargo build --release, tar worker/ + binary + anvilml.toml + database/seeds/), build-windows (cross-compile or windows runner, zip). Upload artifacts. Create release notes from CHANGELOG. Generate SHA256SUMS file. cargo build --release exits 0; release zip contains anvilml binary + worker/ directory + anvilml.toml.

description: scripts: install_worker_deps.sh and .ps1 extended with hardware detection and torch installation
context: Extend scripts/install_worker_deps.sh (created in P8-B3): after base.txt install, detect nvidia-smi->cuda, amdgpu/rocminfo->rocm, else cpu; pip install matching cuda/rocm-linux/cpu.txt. Extend install_worker_deps.ps1: AMD detection via Get-CimInstance or amd-smi; installs rocm-windows.txt for ROCm. Both remain idempotent. bash -n exits 0 for .sh; PSScriptAnalyzer passes for .ps1; bash scripts/install_worker_deps.sh && worker/.venv/bin/python3 -c "import torch" exits 0.
